vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-compliant with the visual evidence. P1 (Yellow Pot) and P2/P4 (Black Pot) are present but show no signs of the expected botanical specimens. P3 (Pothos) is absent or entirely obscured/lost.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No String of Nickels visible; soil appears barren.
inventory_reconciliation.P2/P4: Systemic Loss: No Mexican Mint or Silver Guest visible; soil appears barren.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: White rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is not visible.
inventory_reconciliation.New_Introduction: A white cylindrical object (likely a supplement or chemical container) has been introduced near the yellow pot.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil, no vegetative growth detected.
plant_audit.P2_P4: Empty soil, no vegetative growth detected.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present, but the host plant is missing.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no surface cracking.
biome_observations.debris: White granular material (likely crushed eggshell or perlite) is present on the surface of the black pot containing the rabbit anchor.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-5: Introduction of a metallic spoon near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t-5_to_t-3: Removal of the spoon; introduction of a white cylindrical container.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_current: The white container remains; no vegetative growth observed throughout the sequence.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total vegetative failure. All registered plants are either dead, removed, or buried. The environment is being maintained as a soil-only setup.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of a white rabbit figurine in a pot devoid of plant life suggests a decorative or memorial setup rather than an active botanical cultivation.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected flora. The pots are occupied by soil and occasional debris (eggshells/perlite). The white rabbit anchor remains in the black pot, but the Pothos is absent. The environment has transitioned from a potential plant nursery to a static, non-vegetated state over the 5-day observation window.
